existing_features.title: On the AdminLoginPage, pre-fill the email field with 'magic.nellorehub@gmail.com' and ensure the auto-seeding logic (first-admin credential seed) runs on page load when no admin exists, so the hardcoded admin is immediately usable without any manual registration step.

new_feature_requests.summary: Register a permanent admin account with email magic.nellorehub@gmail.com

On the backend, add a mechanism to seed a permanent first admin credential with email 'magic.nellorehub@gmail.com' and the SHA-256 hash of password 'Munnu1998@'. This seed should be applied during canister initialization (or via an idempotent init/upgrade hook) so that the admin account always exists regardless of canister state.
